products.name: FT205
products.descriptor: Compact ultrasonic anemometer for drone-mounted wind measurement

evidence.snippet: > The FT205, mounted on our drone, worked perfectly in real fire situations. The data it produced proved critically important to the emergency services as they were able to predict the spread of the blaze during the night.

products.name: FT752
products.descriptor: Ultrasonic anemometer measuring up to 90 m/s, JMA-certified

evidence.snippet:
JMA-FT752-100-055
Inspected and verified under Article 28 of the Meteorological Service Act certified by Japan Meteorological Agency (JMA)

Today, FT’s innovations continue to lead the industry. The 752 series measuring wind speeds of up to 90 m/s, and designed for industrial markets or professional use, including wind turbine control, commercial marine, performance sailing, drones and many other critical safety and control applications.

products.name: FT702
products.descriptor: Original acoustic resonance wind sensor, stainless steel body
products.notes: FT702 was the first FT acoustic resonance wind sensor to enter serial production (2000); about-us page describes this but the relevant sentence exceeds the 60-word citation limit. Image alt text on line 83 names the product.

unresolved_questions: FT742-DM50: Named in a customer testimonial (resource-0001, line 182) as 'a great new model' with laser-alignment tooling, but that line is a single serialised paragraph exceeding the 60-word citation limit and no adjacent lines repeat the product name. Cannot add_product without a valid citation.

FT722: Named only in the EMC test certificate download list (resource-0006, line 165), which is a single long markdown line containing six URLs and exceeds the 60-word citation limit. No shorter adjacent mention found.
FT742-D-SM: Same situation as FT722 — only in resource-0006 line 165 (too long to cite). No product page or separate mention found.
FT702LM: Same situation — only in resource-0006 line 165 (too long to cite). No separate product page or mention found.

FT7 Series and FT6 Series individual product pages (https://fttechnologies.com/ultrasonic-anemometers/ft7-series and ft6-series) were skipped (status: skipped_class_budget). Fetching these would likely expose full SKU lists for both families and resolve FT742-DM50, FT722, FT742-D-SM, and other variant models.

fetch_requests.reason: Product page for the FT7 Series family was skipped; would list individual SKUs including FT722, FT742, FT742-DM50, FT742-D-SM, FT743, FT752 with descriptions and readiness signals.
Product page for the FT6 Series family was skipped; would list individual SKUs including FT602 and any other FT6xx models with full specs and readiness signals.
